/usr/bin/clang++  -fPIC -g -g -O0 -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_array.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_array.dir/test_array.cpp.o -o ../bin/tests/test_array  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rperdi/projects/cplusplus/repos/OrdenarEnteros/build/lib ../lib/libordenamiento_lib.so.1.0.0 ../lib/libgtest_main.so.1.14.0 ../lib/libgtest.so.1.14.0
